name: Ferris
ai_summary: Ferris would separate children and deescalate conflicts calmly while hearing both sides. He brings two years of daycare experience with all age groups, a flexible schedule, and a genuine love for making learning fun with kids.

transcripts.q3: Hi. I'm Ferris Marie. And I'm 22 years old, and I went to last our high school and the University of North Georgia for a year. I also worked at my lifetime, Jim's daycare center with infants, all the way to kids who were 13. I love being around kids and I have two younger siblings. I grew up with and I help take care of them. So I have a lot of experience from that.
transcripts.q4: I live in Marietta Georgia and I don't mind going to Woodstock Roswell, Acworth Kennesaw Cherokee. I would like to stay in like a 35 minute, maybe 40 minutes away from where I live.
transcripts.q5: I would want to work part-time and I would say, my schedule is pretty flexible.
transcripts.q6: If one child had another child, I would separate them and do my best to deescalate the situation, and I would hear both of the kids stories.
transcripts.q7: I think I would make a great up kids teacher because I love being around kids. I'm a hard worker and I always show up on time and have a flexible schedule.
